chiSiamo.title: Who we are
chiSiamo.body: We are a collective of enthusiastic students with a strong passion for economics, Bitcoin, and emerging technologies.

missione.title: Mission
missione.body: Spread knowledge about Bitcoin and decentralized technologies, promoting critical thinking and innovation among university students.

visione.title: Vision
visione.body: Build a community of aware students, passionate about technology and supportive of a freer, more transparent economic future.
